sentence: 一个好老师要有扎实的专业素养。
pinyin: Yī gè hǎo lǎoshī yào yǒu zhāshi de zhuānyè sùyǎng.
english: A good teacher needs to have solid professional attainment.

sentence: 窗外的美景让我忘了时间。
pinyin: Chuāng wài de měi jǐng ràng wǒ wàng le shí jiān.
english: The beautiful scenery outside the window made me lose track of time.

sentence: 工作和生活之间要有清楚的界线。
pinyin: Gōngzuò hé shēnghuó zhī jiān yào yǒu qīngchǔ de jièxiàn.
english: There should be a clear boundary between work and personal life.

sentence: 面试那天他特意穿了一套西装。
pinyin: Miànshì nà tiān tā tèyì chuān le yī tào xīzhuāng.
english: On the day of his interview he deliberately wore a suit.

sentence: 这门科学史课让我了解了很多发明故事。
pinyin: Zhè mén kēxuéshǐ kè ràng wǒ liǎojiě le hěn duō fāmíng gùshì.
english: This history of science course taught me many stories about inventions.
